chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2656 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِذَا اِشْتَكَى اَلْمُحْرِمُ فَلْيَتَدَاوَ بِمَا يَحِلُّ لَهُ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ وَ هُوَ مُحْرِمٌ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2656 - Imam (as) said:
"If a Muhrim falls ill, let him seek treatment with what is permissible for him to consume while in the state of Ihram."
